title: Tekken 7
notes: Performance differs a lot between stages. Hard to reach 60 fps on medium/high settings (should be no problem, not a demanding game).

title: Tekken 7
notes: Ultra, 1440p, 55-60 fps. Shader compile stutters are practically gone (most if not all stutter happens in loading screen). Xbox 360 controller works.
Never really starts. First a windows box that says something about failed to connect to network, then a brief small black window and then it quits.

title: TEKKEN 7

gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon (TM) RX 470 Graphics (POLARIS10, DRM 3.23.0, 4.15.13-1-MANJARO, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: Runs at 55-60 fps on high/ultra settings. I played a few hours of treasure battle, practice, and story mode without any issue. Xbox 360 controller and Hori arcade stick worked out of the box. I had a issue with "the server being unreachable", but this was solved by starting the game once in Steam runtime. The game works flawlessly in both runtime and native now.
title: TEKKEN 7

notes: I had proton 3.7-6 Beta defined in my settings, installed it and it ran almost perfectly. Keyboard settings don't seem to want to change,  though.
title: TEKKEN 7

notes: Game launches and is playable. Setting shadow quality higher than "Low" leads to extremely poor frame rates. Issues with game registering Xbox controller's left analog stick as being stuck in the upper-left position.

notes: funciona perfecto, pero hay que ir a configuraciones para que se ponga en pantalla completa

title: TEKKEN 7

gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon (TM) RX 480 Graphics (POLARIS10, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.9-1-MANJARO, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: "The server is not reachable, check your internet connection and click "Retry"" DRM issue solved with STEAM_RUNTIME=1 Then would not launch because of "DX11 feature level 10.0 is required to run the engine". "dxlevel 11" and "DXVK_FAKE_DX11_SUPPORT=1" arguments both didn't work. Winetricks d3dx11_42 - 43 on proton prefix didn't help either. Game shows splash screen then reports errors and closes.
title: TEKKEN 7

notes: Game runs perfectly, in fullscreen with constant 60 fps using Proton 3.7-7 Beta
title: TEKKEN 7

notes: runs perfectly for me. No issue with servers.

notes: Nvidia card users experiencing poor frame rates can spoof an AMD card to work around failed NVAPI calls and improve performance (https://www.reddit.com/r/SteamPlay/comments/9m18ck/troubleshooting_performance/).

notes: Worked great. Some minor framerate issues.

title: TEKKEN 7

notes: First the game didn't work because of "DX11 Feature level 10.0 is required to run the engine". I found the fix to use "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" in launch options, then it boots. But in the intros and title menu and every other menu, I get only cyan on my screen and maybe some text flickering in green. On stages, they disappear, but instead of them I get very small fps (<60 or <~30) on high. On Windows 10, it runs perfectly without any FPS drops and those strange and eye bleeding cyan "artifacts"
title: TEKKEN 7

notes:
The game doesn't necessary run at 60fps for me but close enough with 57-59fps when spoofing an AMD card in use, only one stage (Kinder Gym) let the game run at 30fps which is odd but still fine as it's constant.

I used https://www.reddit.com/r/SteamPlay/comments/9m18ck/troubleshooting_performance/ as a reference as it has been mentioned before to work for Tekken7.

Also in my case, Plasma's widget bars like to cover the game when starting.
Switching to windowed mode and back to either fullscreen or borderless window mode helps until the game gets started next time. Otherwise I use to play with my XBOX360 wireless controller which works just fine.
title: TEKKEN 7

notes: This is the first proton game i played.. Frame rate is low, maybe my graphic card is not powerful enough!. Personally i  don't think that is a factor as most other graphic intensive games run in much better frame-rate(native Linux games). I get frame-rate ranging from 30 - 60 fps not more than 60 even with low settings. Strange. I haven't done any tweaks just installed the huge game and started and played for 5 hours.. And XBOX 360 works nicely..
title: TEKKEN 7

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2500U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes: Also have a RX560X (POLARIS11) discrete GPU. Have to drop to low settings and 720p to get  ~55fps. At 1080p low settings, get 40-45fps on average with a lot of input lag (even with VSync disabled).
title: TEKKEN 7

notes: Il gioco si avvia, non ci sono problemi di connessione con i server multiplayer ma, risulta impossibile giocare, ci sono numerosi glitch grafici lampeggianti che causano mal di testa.
title: TEKKEN 7

notes:
After unsuccessful first launch I tried PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 and got the same result as the others: "in the intros and title menu and every other menu, I get only cyan on my screen and maybe some text flickering in green..." But then I found, that my Ubuntu doesn't have mesa-vulkan-drivers installed by default: https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/ubuntu-meta/+bug/1765800
 After drivers installation, everything works perfectly!
title: TEKKEN 7

notes: Works very well performance wise. Both KB+M and Xbox One Controller worked great.
title: TEKKEN 7
